insulate_base.title: Insulate your base against Cold Sweat temperature — use armor insulation, heat sources, and block layering

subtitle.text: Cold Sweat does not pause when you are building. The base temperature is an engineering problem. Solve it.

description: CH.10 · CLIMATE ENGINEERING
▸ Cold Sweat has been running in the background
since you left spawn.
By Ch10 you have the infrastructure to solve it
permanently instead of managing it constantly.
Climate Engineering is that solution.
◈ COLD SWEAT TEMPERATURE OVERVIEW
└ Every block has a temperature value
└ Player's body temperature = average of nearby blocks
└ Too cold: Hypothermia buildup → health loss
└ Too hot: Hyperthermia buildup → health loss
└ Thermometer: check current body temp at any time
└ Desert biome: ~120°F ambient (requires cooling)
└ Tundra biome: -40°F ambient (requires heating)
◈ BASE INSULATION STRATEGY
└ Wool blocks: best insulation material
Line walls with wool to buffer extreme ambient temps
└ Heat sources: campfire, furnace, lava block adjacent
raises ambient temp inside enclosed space
└ Nuclear reactor waste heat: pipe into base heating
CNA Heat Pipes carry warmth passively through walls
└ Insulated armor: Cold Sweat armor pieces
provide direct body temperature offset
◈ FREEZE IT & HEAT IT INTEGRATION
└ Food freeze mechanic: food stored in cold areas
lasts longer — use Cold Sweat cold zones for storage
└ Food rot mechanic: hot areas accelerate spoilage
Separate food storage from heat pipes
└ Optimal: cold storage room (wool-insulated, ice-adjacent)
+ separate warm living/work area (reactor-adjacent)
◈ SCROLL: Climate Engineering
└ Found in insulated workshop structures,
thermal research loot, Cold Sweat config chests
└ Research time: 25 min
└ Unlocks: full Cold Sweat insulation reference,
block temperature table, base design principles
▸ The cold does not know you are a person.
The heat does not know you are mortal.
They both treat you the same way.
The solution is the same: infrastructure.
▶ Find The Climate Engineering scroll [check]
▶ Insulate your base against Cold Sweat [check]
◇ Nuclear reactor passive heat + wool insulation
= zero Cold Sweat concerns inside your base.
You will never wear thermal armor at home again.
